prestazioni: Engine: Ford Duratec V6 (engine code: **3.0L V6 24V Ford Cyclone (MI4)**) – Full forged internals upgrade with **Manley forged pistons (9.5:1 CR)**, **Carrillo H-beam connecting rods**, and **JE custom billet crankshaft** for 1,000+ HP reliability. Turbo system: **Precision Turbo PT6266 CEA (Journal Bearing) with TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegates** and **custom 4-inch stainless steel exhaust with Burns Stainless merge collectors** for optimized spool and top-end flow.

Fuel System: **Bosch Motorsport 2,200cc injectors** paired with **AEM 400LPH high-flow fuel pump** and **Radium Engineering dual fuel pressure regulators**. ECU: **Syvecs S12 standalone ECU with custom M500-specific calibration** for flex-fuel (E85) and launch control, replacing the stock Ford PCM. Ignition: **NGK R847-10 iridium racing plugs** gapped at 0.022" with **MSD 8518 Digital 7AL-3 ignition box** for multi-spark capability.

Drivetrain & Suspension: **Quaife ATB helical LSD** in the transaxle with **PPG 1st-4th gear sets (dog-ring upgrade)** for sequential shifting. **Öhlins TTX40 coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping** and **Noble-specific spherical bearing control arms** for camber/caster adjustability. Brakes: **AP Racing CP8660 6-piston calipers** with **380mm 2-piece rotors (floating)** and **Ferodo DS3000 pads** for track endurance.
estetica: Aero: **Noble M500 GT-Spec widebody kit (carbon fiber)** with **custom Vortex Generators on the rear diffuser** for downforce optimization. **Rear wing: APR Performance GTC-300 (30" chord) with adjustable carbon fiber endplates** and **DTM-style gurney flap** for high-speed stability.

Body & Interior: **Full carbon fiber body panels (hood, fenders, doors, rear clamshell)** from **Noble Automotive’s in-house composites division**, reducing weight by 80 lbs. **Custom Recaro SPG XL seats (carbon shell, Alcantara/leather)** with **Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses** and **MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede)** for driver ergonomics.

Lighting & Details: **Lucid Air LED headlights (DRL/low-beam combo)** with **custom Hella 500FF driving lamps** for night-track use. **Carbon fiber engine cover with clear polycarbonate window** to showcase the **custom anodized red turbo compressor housings** and **gold-plated AN fittings**. **BBS LM-R wheels (19x10 ET35 front, 19x12 ET40 rear)** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R (265/35/19 front, 305/30/19 rear)** for maximum grip.
